title: More Armor Trims
description: Adds 13 new armor trims to discover and collect
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FGNYBAJ6/images/d6764b0378493bf69be056f7e3aa3e28e9c6ab33.png)
If you thought that there could be more armor trims in Minecraft, you are just like me! And this mod is definitely for you, it adds new armor trims to the game, that are quite hard to obtain. Currently, ten new smithing templates added, but I am looking to add more.

_Mod reqiures [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)._

_For updates and teasers, you can join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/6d52nzVFJY) :D_

![Storm and Ram Armor Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FGNYBAJ6/images/68eb54823c0cc597f13e3085f8711334718fa7d0.png)

![Myth and Greed Armor Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FGNYBAJ6/images/c0e5345a2629dc55bd3d2685a107f67aaea9f1b0.png)

![Beast and Fever Armor Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FGNYBAJ6/images/f640b807d9e423476540541a34f4527902552812.png)

![Wraith and Nihility Armor Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FGNYBAJ6/images/501bb414abd1959ee1ab71b73fce2b0f0ecabe25.png)

![Horizon and Origin Armor Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FGNYBAJ6/images/77ead45cb07265b496c9c493e55ad854a0f7226d.png)

![Twilight, Parasite and Witness Armor Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FGNYBAJ6/images/6c730ea55237fc3eba337bafd51bf8cdec79820a.png)

<details>
<summary>How to obtain</summary>

Storm:
Can be obtained through fishing during thunder, and comes with a treasure (33% chance)

Ram:
Kill a Ravager that has an Evoker as a passenger or an Evoker riding a Ravager

Myth:
Can be bought from Wandering Trader for 15 emeralds

Greed:
Can be found in badland mineshafts (20% chance)

Beast:
Can be found in igloo basement (50% chance)

Fever:
Can be found in a ruined portal in the nether (20% chance)

Wraith:
Kill a Wither in the Soul Sand Valley biome

Nihility:
Drops from a spawner in the Overworld (30% chance)

Horizon:
Can be found in suspicious gravel in cold ocean ruins (6% chance)

Origin:
Can be found by sniffer in Old Growth Taiga (30% chance)

Twilight:
Can be found by a cat as a morning gift (11% chance)

Parasite:
Drops from an endermite killed by an enderman (20% chance)

Witness:
Drops from a natural creaking heart during the night (20% chance)

</details>
